name: dory-memory
description: Use a shared Dory memory graph from Codex sessions.

interface.shortDescription: Shared persistent memory for Codex and Claude Code.
interface.longDescription: Connect Codex to the same Dory memory graph used by Claude Code. Query shared memory at session start, store durable observations during work, and consolidate at session end.
defaultPrompt: Load the current Dory project memory.
Store this decision in Dory memory.
